what_it_does: Records a channel attachment named att-d07fabd8 in the dragnet-development channel, of type board_items, targeting board item item-5a25262b, with an added timestamp.
observations: The file is a YAML front-matter metadata record with no body content.
standouts: Attachment-to-board-item linkage via a board:// URI scheme.
Empty body after the front matter.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with a fixed metadata key set (id, channel, attachment_type, target, added).
Attachment IDs use an att- prefix with a hex slug.
Targets use a board://item-<id> URI format.
concerns: The file contains no descriptive text or context about why this attachment was added.
No author or source message reference is recorded.
notes: This is a minimal channel attachment metadata stub that points a board item to the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or discussion does this attachment capture from the channel?
Is the target board item expected to be created, updated, or referenced by this attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an attachment index entry, and its content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems intended to create a durable, discoverable record associating a channel artifact with a specific board item for later retrieval or fusion.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, which a fused system can use to correlate channel memory with board items.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata attachment record linking attachment att-d07fabd8 in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-5a25262b with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a reference from a channel artifact to a board item for cross-context retrieval.
